headline: 2 hours of notes, done in 2 minutes
primary_text:
Here's what 2 extra hours of documentation every day costs you:

• 520 hours per year staying late
• Missed dinners, bedtimes, your own life
• Burnout that makes you question this career

JotPsych generates your clinical notes automatically. Record your session, and our HIPAA-compliant AI creates complete documentation in minutes—not hours.

Stop choosing between quality care and having a life. 1,200+ therapists already made the switch.

Try JotPsych free: jotpsych.com
